negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_b744c2cd-885a-4e8f-9d78-f38c7ec261de
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showing a multi-lane road under a partly cloudy sky. The road curves gently to the left, bordered by trees on the right side and a grassy area with some structures visible in the distance. A white sedan is ahead, driving in the same lane as the camera's perspective. Further down the road, a large truck with a colorful advertisement on its side is seen, along with other vehicles including a white SUV. The road markings are visible, and there are signs indicating directions. Three different lane markers, left-turn only, left-or-right turn, and right-turn only, are seen on the road. Corresponding traffic signs are visible on both sides of the road. As the video progresses, the white sedan ahead begins to slow down and then comes to a stop at an intersection marked by a yield sign. The ego vehicle continues forward, maintaining a steady pace behind the stopped sedan. The truck further ahead also slows down slightly but remains in motion. The surrounding environment, including the trees and road signs, remains static throughout the sequence. By the final frame, the ego vehicle has passed the intersection where the white sedan had stopped and reached a point from which green traffic lights at the intersection are visible. The road continues straight ahead, with the truck now further ahead and the white SUV still visible in the lane to the left. The trees and road signs remain unchanged, and the sky retains its partly cloudy appearance.  A steady, forward-moving shot from the perspective of a dashboard camera captures the journey on a multi-lane road, showcasing the dynamic interaction between vehicles and the static beauty of the roadside environment.
